first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns is substantively identical. Both evaluations correctly identify the same key strengths (diverse technical background, full-stack skills) and the same key weaknesses (limited recent C++, lack of industrial automation and specific security standards experience). The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not indicate any bias based on the name change.
